revision.text:
'''乙未'''（きのとひつじ、いつび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて32番目で、前は[[甲午]]、次は[[丙申]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==乙未の年==
==乙未の日== ===[[選日]]=== 乙未の日は[[天一天上]]の3日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''乙未'''（きのとひつじ、おつぼくのひつじ、いつび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの32番目で、前は[[甲午]]、次は[[丙申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==乙未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って35が余る年が乙未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[35年]] *[[95年]] *[[155年]] *[[215年]] *[[275年]] *[[335年]] *[[395年]] *[[455年]] *[[515年]] *[[575年]] *[[635年]] *[[695年]] *[[755年]] *[[815年]] *[[875年]] *[[935年]] *[[995年]] | *[[1055年]] *[[1115年]] *[[1175年]] *[[1235年]] *[[1295年]] *[[1355年]] *[[1415年]] *[[1475年]] *[[1535年]] *[[1595年]] *[[1655年]] *[[1715年]] *[[1775年]] *[[1835年]] *[[1895年]] *[[1955年]] | *[[2015年]] *[[2075年]] *[[2135年]] *[[2195年]] *[[2255年]] *[[2315年]] *[[2375年]] *[[2435年]] *[[2495年]] *[[2555年]] *[[2615年]] *[[2675年]] *[[2735年]] *[[2795年]] *[[2855年]] *[[2915年]] *[[2975年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[乙未事変]]（1895年） *[[乙未戦争]]（1895年）
==乙未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[6月]]が乙未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙未の日== 乙未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙未の日は[[天一天上]]の3日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:乙未]]

{{干支}} '''乙未'''（きのとひつじ、おつぼくのひつじ、いつび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの32番目で、前は[[甲午]]、次は[[丙申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==乙未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って35が余る年が乙未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[35年]] *[[95年]] *[[155年]] *[[215年]] *[[275年]] *[[335年]] *[[395年]] *[[455年]] *[[515年]] *[[575年]] *[[635年]] *[[695年]] *[[755年]] *[[815年]] *[[875年]] *[[935年]] *[[995年]] | *[[1055年]] *[[1115年]] *[[1175年]] *[[1235年]] *[[1295年]] *[[1355年]] *[[1415年]] *[[1475年]] *[[1535年]] *[[1595年]] *[[1655年]] *[[1715年]] *[[1775年]] *[[1835年]] *[[1895年]] *[[1955年]] | *[[2015年]] *[[2075年]] *[[2135年]] *[[2195年]] *[[2255年]] *[[2315年]] *[[2375年]] *[[2435年]] *[[2495年]] *[[2555年]] *[[2615年]] *[[2675年]] *[[2735年]] *[[2795年]] *[[2855年]] *[[2915年]] *[[2975年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[乙未事変]]（1895年） *[[乙未戦争]]（1895年）
==乙未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[6月]]が乙未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙未の日== 乙未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙未の日は[[天一天上]]の3日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:乙未]]

==乙未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って35が余る年が乙未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[35年]] *[[95年]] *[[155年]] *[[215年]] *[[275年]] *[[335年]] *[[395年]] *[[455年]] *[[515年]] *[[575年]] *[[635年]] *[[695年]] *[[755年]] *[[815年]] *[[875年]] *[[935年]] *[[995年]] | *[[1055年]] *[[1115年]] *[[1175年]] *[[1235年]] *[[1295年]] *[[1355年]] *[[1415年]] *[[1475年]] *[[1535年]] *[[1595年]] *[[1655年]] *[[1715年]] *[[1775年]] *[[1835年]] *[[1895年]] *[[1955年]] | *[[2015年]] *[[2075年]] *[[2135年]] *[[2195年]] *[[2255年]] *[[2315年]] *[[2375年]] *[[2435年]] *[[2495年]] *[[2555年]] *[[2615年]] *[[2675年]] *[[2735年]] *[[2795年]] *[[2855年]] *[[2915年]] *[[2975年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[乙未事変]]（1895年） *[[乙未戦争]]（1895年）
==乙未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[6月]]が乙未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙未の日== 乙未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙未の日は[[天一天上]]の3日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Goat-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Goat-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]]

==乙未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って35が余る年が乙未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[35年]] *[[95年]] *[[155年]] *[[215年]] *[[275年]] *[[335年]] *[[395年]] *[[455年]] *[[515年]] *[[575年]] *[[635年]] *[[695年]] *[[755年]] *[[815年]] *[[875年]] *[[935年]] *[[995年]] | *[[1055年]] *[[1115年]] *[[1175年]] *[[1235年]] *[[1295年]] *[[1355年]] *[[1415年]] *[[1475年]] *[[1535年]] *[[1595年]] *[[1655年]] *[[1715年]] *[[1775年]] *[[1835年]] *[[1895年]] *[[1955年]] | *[[2015年]] *[[2075年]] *[[2135年]] *[[2195年]] *[[2255年]] *[[2315年]] *[[2375年]] *[[2435年]] *[[2495年]] *[[2555年]] *[[2615年]] *[[2675年]] *[[2735年]] *[[2795年]] *[[2855年]] *[[2915年]] *[[2975年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[乙未事変]]（1895年） *[[乙未戦争]]（1895年）
==乙未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[6月]]が乙未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙未の日== 乙未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙未の日は[[天一天上]]の3日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Goat-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Goat-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの32番目で、前は[[甲午]]、次は[[丙申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==乙未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って35が余る年が乙未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[35年]] *[[95年]] *[[155年]] *[[215年]] *[[275年]] *[[335年]] *[[395年]] *[[455年]] *[[515年]] *[[575年]] *[[635年]] *[[695年]] *[[755年]] *[[815年]] *[[875年]] *[[935年]] *[[995年]] | *[[1055年]] *[[1115年]] *[[1175年]] *[[1235年]] *[[1295年]] *[[1355年]] *[[1415年]] *[[1475年]] *[[1535年]] *[[1595年]] *[[1655年]] *[[1715年]] *[[1775年]] *[[1835年]] *[[1895年]] *[[1955年]] | *[[2015年]] *[[2075年]] *[[2135年]] *[[2195年]] *[[2255年]] *[[2315年]] *[[2375年]] *[[2435年]] *[[2495年]] *[[2555年]] *[[2615年]] *[[2675年]] *[[2735年]] *[[2795年]] *[[2855年]] *[[2915年]] *[[2975年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[乙未事変]]（1895年） *[[乙未戦争]]（1895年）
==乙未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[6月]]が乙未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙未の日== 乙未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙未の日は[[天一天上]]の3日目である。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==乙未の年== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙未の年''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35年]] * [[95年]] * [[155年]] * [[215年]] * [[275年]] * [[335年]] * [[395年]] * [[455年]] * [[515年]] * [[575年]] * [[635年]] * [[695年]] * [[755年]] * [[815年]] * [[875年]] * [[935年]] * [[995年]] | * [[1055年]] * [[1115年]] * [[1175年]] * [[1235年]] * [[1295年]] * [[1355年]] * [[1415年]] * [[1475年]] * [[1535年]] * [[1595年]] * [[1655年]] * [[1715年]] * [[1775年]] * [[1835年]] * [[1895年]] * [[1955年]] | * [[2015年]] * [[2075年]] * [[2135年]] * [[2195年]] * [[2255年]] * [[2315年]] * [[2375年]] * [[2435年]] * [[2495年]] * [[2555年]] * [[2615年]] * [[2675年]] * [[2735年]] * [[2795年]] * [[2855年]] * [[2915年]] * [[2975年]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==乙未の月== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==乙未の日== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

revision.comment: running the first mass translation of headings to overcome chatGPT error
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙未の年''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35年]] * [[95年]] * [[155年]] * [[215年]] * [[275年]] * [[335年]] * [[395年]] * [[455年]] * [[515年]] * [[575年]] * [[635年]] * [[695年]] * [[755年]] * [[815年]] * [[875年]] * [[935年]] * [[995年]] | * [[1055年]] * [[1115年]] * [[1175年]] * [[1235年]] * [[1295年]] * [[1355年]] * [[1415年]] * [[1475年]] * [[1535年]] * [[1595年]] * [[1655年]] * [[1715年]] * [[1775年]] * [[1835年]] * [[1895年]] * [[1955年]] | * [[2015年]] * [[2075年]] * [[2135年]] * [[2195年]] * [[2255年]] * [[2315年]] * [[2375年]] * [[2435年]] * [[2495年]] * [[2555年]] * [[2615年]] * [[2675年]] * [[2735年]] * [[2795年]] * [[2855年]] * [[2915年]] * [[2975年]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35年]] * [[95年]] * [[155年]] * [[215年]] * [[275年]] * [[335年]] * [[395年]] * [[455年]] * [[515年]] * [[575年]] * [[635年]] * [[695年]] * [[755年]] * [[815年]] * [[875年]] * [[935年]] * [[995年]] | * [[1055年]] * [[1115年]] * [[1175年]] * [[1235年]] * [[1295年]] * [[1355年]] * [[1415年]] * [[1475年]] * [[1535年]] * [[1595年]] * [[1655年]] * [[1715年]] * [[1775年]] * [[1835年]] * [[1895年]] * [[1955年]] | * [[2015年]] * [[2075年]] * [[2135年]] * [[2195年]] * [[2255年]] * [[2315年]] * [[2375年]] * [[2435年]] * [[2495年]] * [[2555年]] * [[2615年]] * [[2675年]] * [[2735年]] * [[2795年]] * [[2855年]] * [[2915年]] * [[2975年]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Goat]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]] [[af:Aardevark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Schweineen]][[en:Earth Pig]][[fr:Cochon de terreboishak]][[it:Ki-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichinja]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Erd-Schweinevi]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Keiceij]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Goat]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]] [[af:Aardevark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Schweineen]][[en:Earth Pig]][[fr:Cochon de terreboishak]][[it:Ki-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichinja]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Erd-Schweinevi]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Keiceij]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "qqq" to "qq"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Goat]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]] [[af:Aardevark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Schweineen]][[en:Earth Pig]][[fr:Cochon de terreboishak]][[it:Ki-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichinja]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Erd-Schweinevi]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Keiceij]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Goat]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]] [[af:Aardevark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Schweineen]][[en:Earth Pig]][[fr:Cochon de terreboishak]][[it:Ki-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichinja]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Erd-Schweinevi]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Keiceij]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qqqq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Goat]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]] [[af:Aardevark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Schweineen]][[en:Earth Pig]][[fr:Cochon de terreboishak]][[it:Ki-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichinja]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Erd-Schweinevi]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Keiceij]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙未]][[Category:11]] [[Category:乙未]][[Category:乙未]][[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Goat-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙未]][[zh:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Goat]][[Category:11]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上}}.

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|12=draft|12=draft}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|12=draft|12=draft}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|12=draft|12=draft}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|12=draft|12=draft}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|12=draft|12=draft}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|12=draft|12=draft}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|12=draft|12=draft}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|12=draft|12=draft}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|12=draft|12=draft}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|12=draft|12=draft}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|12=draft|12=draft}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|12=draft|12=draft}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|12=draft|12=draft}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|12=draft|12=draft}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}}
<!--Yin Wood Goat-->
<!--Yin Wood Goat-->

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|12=draft|12=draft}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|12=draft|12=draft}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|12=draft|12=draft}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|12=draft|12=draft}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|12=draft|12=draft}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|12=draft|12=draft}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|12=draft|12=draft}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} <!--Yin Wood Goat-->
<!--Yin Wood Goat-->
[[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Erd-Schweinevi]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己亥]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:QQ]] [[Category:乙未]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Yin Wood Goat]] [[ja:乙未]] [[en:Yin Wood Goat]] [[zh:乙未]] [[ko:을미]] [[fr:Chèvre de bois]] [[de:Holz-Schaf]] [[sn:in Wood Goat]] [[af:Aardevark (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Schweineen]] [[en:Earth Pig]] [[fr:Cochon de terreboishak]] [[it:Ki-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichinja]] [[ko:기해]] [[vi:Kỷ Hợi]] [[za:Keiceij]] [[zh:己亥]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Goat}} [[ar:Yin Wood Goat]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己亥]]

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=}}. ==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|土|" to "|土|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己亥]]

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=}}. ==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
