In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|丙|" to "|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|1=Goat (Zodiac)|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === 出来事 === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|1=Goat (Zodiac)|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|1=Goat (Zodiac)|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1st Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Millennium|qq=}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3rd Millennium|qq=}} |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * {{ill|Otsemi Jihen|ja|乙未事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Jihen|qq=}} (1895) * {{ill|Otsemi Sensou|ja|乙未戦争|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsemi Sensou|qq=}} (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} ==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|1=Common Era|2=ja|3=西暦|4=zh|5=公元|6=es|7=Era común|8=nl|9=Gangbare jaartelling|10=simple|11=Common Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Common Era|qq=}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heavenly Stems|qq=}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|ja|6月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June|qq=}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/month (calendar)|qq=}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|二十四節気|1=Solar term|2=ja|3=二十四節気|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seasonal Month|qq=}} (from {{ill|Minor Heat|ja|小暑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minor Heat|qq=}} until the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beginning of Autumn|qq=}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Years== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

[[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Months== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== PronounceYin Wood Goat
==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.
