It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== PronounciationYin Wood Goat \n<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.

Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. --> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[1055]] * [[1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[1175]] * [[1235]] * [[1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[:en:1355|1355]] * [[1415]] * [[1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[:en:1355|1355]] * [[:en:1415|1415]] * [[:en:1475|1475]] * [[1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[:en:1355|1355]] * [[:en:1415|1415]] * [[:en:1475|1475]] * [[:en:1535|1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. <!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[:en:155|155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[:en:1355|1355]] * [[:en:1415|1415]] * [[:en:1475|1475]] * [[:en:1535|1535]] * [[1595]] * [[1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[:en:155|155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[:en:1355|1355]] * [[:en:1415|1415]] * [[:en:1475|1475]] * [[:en:1535|1535]] * [[:en:1595|1595]] * [[:en:1655|1655]] * [[1715]] * [[1775]] * [[1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}}. hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: itsubi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[:en:155|155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[:en:1355|1355]] * [[:en:1415|1415]] * [[:en:1475|1475]] * [[:en:1535|1535]] * [[:en:1595|1595]] * [[:en:1655|1655]] * [[:en:1715|1715]] * [[:en:1775|1775]] * [[:en:1835|1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=}}.

<!-- == * Yin Wood Goat (乙未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとひつじ (kinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつかのひつじ (otsuka-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[35]] * [[95]] * [[:en:155|155]] * [[215]] * [[275]] * [[335]] * [[395]] * [[455]] * [[515]] * [[575]] * [[635]] * [[695]] * [[755]] * [[815]] * [[875]] * [[935]] * [[995]] | * [[:en:1055|1055]] * [[:en:1115|1115]] * [[:en:1175|1175]] * [[:en:1235|1235]] * [[:en:1295|1295]] * [[:en:1355|1355]] * [[:en:1415|1415]] * [[:en:1475|1475]] * [[:en:1535|1535]] * [[:en:1595|1595]] * [[:en:1655|1655]] * [[:en:1715|1715]] * [[:en:1775|1775]] * [[:en:1835|1835]] * [[1895]] * [[1955]] | * [[2015]] * [[2075]] * [[2135]] * [[2195]] * [[2255]] * [[2315]] * [[2375]] * [[2435]] * [[2495]] * [[2555]] * [[2615]] * [[2675]] * [[2735]] * [[2795]] * [[2855]] * [[2915]] * [[2975]] |} === Events === * [[:en:Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895) * [[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)
==Months of Yin Wood Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements
